title: BusinessCalibrationOverlay
description: Calibration overlay schema for business domain rules. Adjusts confidence, weights, timing, and ranking WITHOUT altering classical rule definitions.

layer_weights_spec.description: Inter-layer weighting for composite score. These are EMPIRICAL not from classical texts.

fields.dasha_weight: number 0-1, weight of dasha layer in composite score
fields.transit_weight: number 0-1, weight of transit layer in composite score
fields.fast_trigger_weight: number 0-1, weight of fast trigger layer in composite score
fields.classical_weight: number 0-1, weight of classical pattern layer in composite score

likelihood_thresholds_spec.description: Score cutoffs for likelihood bands. EMPIRICAL derived from validation.

fields.very_high: minimum composite score for very_high band
fields.high: minimum composite score for high band
fields.moderate: minimum composite score for moderate band
fields.low: minimum composite score for low band

item_fields.rule_id: string, references a rule in dasha/transit/fast_trigger/classical/outcome files
item_fields.adjustment_type: one of: weight, timing, confidence, priority, window
item_fields.weight_adjustment: number, additive adjustment to rule weight
item_fields.priority_adjustment: integer, additive adjustment to rule priority
item_fields.timing_adjustment_days: integer, shift window by N days
item_fields.supporting_cases: integer, number of validated cases supporting this
item_fields.conflicting_cases: integer, number of cases contradicting this

fields.mode_priority_order: array of mode strings in descending priority
fields.quality_priority_order: array of quality strings in descending priority
fields.mode_confidence_thresholds: object mapping mode to minimum confidence
fields.default_mode: string, fallback mode when no rule fires

fields.timing_accuracy_top5: number 0-1, fraction of cases where actual event fell in top-5 predicted windows
fields.mode_accuracy: number 0-1, fraction of correct mode classifications
fields.quality_accuracy: number 0-1, fraction of correct quality classifications
fields.average_rank: number, mean rank of actual event window among all predicted windows

fields.adjustment_reason: string, why these adjustments were made
fields.reversible: boolean, can this be rolled back
fields.applies_to_personal: boolean, is this personalized or general
fields.safety_notes: string, warnings about sample size or limitations
